PnR_BH.name: Pick-and-roll ball-handler
PnR_BH.description: Possessions where the player uses an on-ball screen (including reject action).

PnR_RM.name: Pick-and-roll roll man
PnR_RM.description: Possessions where the player makes a pick and then rolls, pops, slips, etc.

Transition.name: Transition
Transition.description: Possessions where the player attacks when defense is not set.

Off_Screen.name: Off-screen
Off_Screen.description: Possessions where the player uses an off-ball screen.

Spot_Up.name: Spot-up
Spot_Up.description: Possessions where the player stands still or moves without using an off-ball screen.

Hand_Off.name: Hand-off
Hand_Off.description: Possessions where the player receives the ball in a hand-off.

Cut.name: Cut
Cut.description: Possessions where the player cuts without a screen (including UCLA, flex, etc.).

Putback.name: Putback
Putback.description: Possessions where the player shoots immediately after an offensive rebound.

Post_Up.name: Post-up
Post_Up.description: Possessions where the player performs post-play.

Misc.name: Miscellaneous
Misc.description: Possessions of offense in a form that does not fit any of the above.

Drop.name: Drop
Drop.description: Defender drops back to protect the paint against screens.

Hedge.name: Hedge
Hedge.description: Big defender briefly shows to delay ball-handler on screen.

Over.name: Over
Over.description: Defender goes over the top of the screen.

Rim_Protect.name: Rim Protect
Rim_Protect.description: Protecting the basket and contesting shots at the rim.

Closeout.name: Closeout
Closeout.description: Closing out to shooters on the perimeter.

Rotate.name: Rotate
Rotate.description: Defensive rotation to cover open offensive players.

Deny.name: Deny
Deny.description: Aggressive man-to-man defense to prevent receiving the ball.
